title: Launch of the UK Strategic Public Investment Forum
body: "The document is a high level summary of an internal stocktake of the landscape of public financial institutions. It includes an announcement of a new CEO-level Forum with membership drawn from UK-investing public financial organisations and senior civil servants, whose purpose is to improve strategic alignment and cooperation within and between institutions and government. It also includes an annex with two figures providing more information on what these organisations offer to businesses and investors. "
